name: LYMPHOMA OF THE MESENTERY
dominant_finding: irregular masses / lobulated cake-like heterogeneous mass with areas of low attenuation ←
discriminating_features: "sandwich" sign = mesenteric lymphadenopathy surrounding mesenteric vessels:
irregular masses / lobulated cake-like heterogeneous mass with areas of low attenuation ←
"misty mesentery" = mesenteric fat stranding (especially after chemotherapy)
